name: [GRIDHAND] Competitor Monitor Agent - Competitor posts new service → analyze and report

gridhand.scenario: Competitor posts new service → analyze and report
gridhand.description: When a competitor posts a new service on their Facebook page or website, GRIDHAND's automation workflow is triggered to analyze the post and report back to the business owner, providing a daily summary at 8am via email that outlines the competitor's new offering, including pricing and features, allowing the owner to adjust their own services and stay competitive in the market. This workflow utilizes social media monitoring tools and natural language processing to identify and extract relevant information from the competitor's post, which is then compiled into a concise report that highlights key differences and potential opportunities for the business owner to capitalize on. By receiving this daily report, the business owner can make informed decisions to refine their services, adjust pricing, and ultimately drive more sales and revenue for their company.
